narratives.text: National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are higher for white caged and cage free eggs with the balance not well tested. The undertone is firm to higher. Demand into retail channels is moderate to fairly good. Loose egg movement is light to at times moderate. Offerings are light to instances moderate and held with confidence. Supplies are mostly moderate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are lightly tested. The undertone is firm to higher. Retail is reported as light to moderate by most. Food service demand is generally light. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to light. Market activity is moderate to slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are steady to higher. The undertone is higher. Demand into retail channels is moderate to fairly good. Loose egg movement is light to instances moderate. Offerings are light to moderate and confidently held. Supplies are mixed, mostly moderate and vary by area. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are only lightly tested on Large. The undertone is firm to higher. Retail demand is light to at times moderate, while generally light for food service. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to light. Market activity is moderate to slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are steady to higher. The undertone is higher. Retail demand is reported as moderate to fairly good. Loose egg demand is light to moderate. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies vary by area. Market activity is moderate to instances active. California weighted average delivered prices are lightly tested. The undertone is firm to higher. Demand is light to instances moderate into retail channels. Food service movement is mostly light. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to light. Market activity is moderate to slow.

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are higher for caged Extra Large and Large, lower for caged Mediums, and not well tested for the balance. The undertone is higher. Retail demand is moderate to fairly good, while light to moderate for loose egg demand. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies vary by area. Market activity is moderate to instances active. California weighted average delivered prices are lightly tested. The undertone is higher. Retail and food service demand is light to instances moderate. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to light. Market activity is moderate to slow. The 6-Area Total shell egg inventory declined 3.3% when compared to a week ago. Additional Weekly Shell Egg Inventory Report information can be found at this link https://www.ams.usda.gov/mnreports/ams_1427.pdf

National FOB shell egg weighted average prices are steady to higher. The undertone is higher. Demand into retail channels is seasonally moderate to instances fairly good. Loose egg demand is moderate to light. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are mixed, usually moderate to at times fully adequate. Market activity is moderate. California weighted average delivered prices are lightly tested. The undertone is higher. Demand ranges light to instances fairly good, best where feature activity is present. Offerings are light to moderate. Supplies are moderate to at times light. Market activity is moderate.
